UpdateActivitySlotRequest.description:
Semester-specific fields only. Template fields (name/type/periods/mode/grade)
come from activity_catalog and are edited there — not here.

advisors.description: If provided, replace advisor list entirely (atomic DELETE + INSERT)

term.description:
Pinned term — null means "ทุกเทอม" (always overwrites; no "keep old" semantic).
Caller should pass the existing value to preserve.

default_instructors.description:
When provided, replaces the subject's default team atomically.
Pass `Some([])` to clear all defaults. Leave None to skip team update.
